docs.text: Hi! 👋 Hi, I’m Ryan, a technical writer, knowledge manager, and AI enthusiast, and hiker, forager, baker, and sci-fi nerd. This portfolio is a living, breathing documentation sandbox where I explore tools, workflows, and ideas that light me up. 🚧 This site is currently under construction, so expect half-built scaffolding, scribbled notes in the margins, and lots of sparks. What you'll (soon) find here: ✍️ Docs-as-Code Demos — Using MkDocs and Git to create structured, scalable, version-controlled content 🤖 AI-Assisted Writing Workflows — How I use tools like ChatGPT, Claude, and others in my writing process 🔄 CI/CD for Docs — Notes and experiments around automating content checks and deployments 🧰 Experiments & Explorations — Just me, messing around with ideas 💬 Questions? Curiosity? Find me on LinkedIn or e-mail me to say hi. Stay tuned!
